ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the product */,
  "inner_dimension" INTEGER /* Inner dimension measurement */,
  "outer_dimension" INTEGER /* Outer dimension measurement */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dynamic_values" (
  "dynamic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dynamic value record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "dynamic_cr" REAL /* Dynamic measurement value for the product */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of dynamic measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date the dynamic value was measured */,
  "time_measured" TEXT /* Time the dynamic value was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dynamic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dynamic_values_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "static_values" (
  "static_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the static value record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "static_cor" REAL /* Static measurement value for the product */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of static measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date the static value was measured */,
  "time_measured" TEXT /* Time the static value was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("static_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_static_values_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in pounds */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled stock check */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the supplier was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
